title: This 26 y/o 10x'd Revenue Doing the Opposite of Every AI Startup | Paraform, John Kim
summary: John Kim, founder of Paraform, discusses his contrarian approach to hiring by investing in human recruiters rather than automating them away. The company has paid over $50 million to recruiters and worked with clients like Palantir and Rippling, achieving 10x revenue growth in 2025. Kim argues that AI is making hiring noisier and less efficient, citing rising cold email volume needed for engineering hires.
